name: Core Actions
description: Built-in OpenDeck actions for URLs, app launching, and shell commands.

actions.name: Open URL
actions.description: Open a website or custom protocol target from a Stream Deck key.

actions.name: Launch App
actions.description: Launch an installed application or executable path in the background.

actions.name: Run Command
actions.description: Run a shell command directly from a key and wait for it to finish.
